title: Make new endpoint /lang — GET /lang returns list of supported languages as JSON
description:
## Overview

Implement the `GET /lang` endpoint so that it returns a JSON array of all language codes currently supported by the application.

The existing `TRANSLATIONS` constant in `app.rb` already defines all supported languages (`en`, `pl`, `de`, `fr`). The endpoint should derive the list directly from that constant's keys.

## Reference

Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-25/make-new-endpoint-lang

## Expected response

```json
{
  "languages": ["en", "pl", "de", "fr"]
}
```

## Implementation notes

- Route: `GET /lang` (no query params required for this sub-task)
- Response `content-type` must be `application/json`
- Language list must be derived from `TRANSLATIONS.keys` so it stays in sync automatically when new languages are added
- Follow the same routing pattern used by existing endpoints in `app.rb`
scope: Add the GET /lang route that lists all available language codes as a JSON response.
acceptance_criteria: Response body is valid JSON containing a 'languages' key with an array of all language codes from TRANSLATIONS
Language list matches TRANSLATIONS.keys (currently: en, pl, de, fr)
RSpec test covers the endpoint and asserts the above
relation_to_original: Implements the 'show all possible languages' bullet point from the parent ticket.
